title: cleome daryoushiana
intro: Cleome daryoushiana, commonly known as the Persian spider flower, is a flowering plant species native to Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The therapeutic actions of Cleome daryoushiana are attributed to its bioactive constituents, such as alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
